Class OutboxEvent.Builder

java.lang.Object
io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent.Builder
Enclosing class:
OutboxEvent
public static final class OutboxEvent.Builder extends Object
Fluent builder for OutboxEvent.

Defaults applied at build() time:

  • occurredAt defaults to Instant.now().
  • headers defaults to an empty map.
  • id and destination default to null.
All other fields are required and validated by the record's compact constructor.

Validation failures (null required argument, blank string, null header key/value) surface as OutboxValidationException — a leaf of the sealed OutboxException hierarchy.

Instances are not thread-safe.

Since:
0.1.0

  • Method Details

    • id

      public OutboxEvent.Builder id(UUID newId)
      Sets the event identifier. When left null the implementation generates one.
      Parameters:
      newId - the event id, or null for an auto-generated value.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • aggregateType

      public OutboxEvent.Builder aggregateType(String newAggregateType)
      Sets the aggregate type (non-blank). Width limits are enforced by the dialect at publish time.
      Parameters:
      newAggregateType - the aggregate type.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • aggregateId

      public OutboxEvent.Builder aggregateId(String newAggregateId)
      Sets the aggregate identifier (non-blank). Width limits are enforced by the dialect at publish time.
      Parameters:
      newAggregateId - the aggregate id.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • eventType

      public OutboxEvent.Builder eventType(String newEventType)
      Sets the event type (non-blank). Width limits are enforced by the dialect at publish time.
      Parameters:
      newEventType - the event type.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • contentType

      public OutboxEvent.Builder contentType(String newContentType)
      Sets the content type (non-blank; e.g. application/json). Width limits are enforced by the dialect at publish time.
      Parameters:
      newContentType - the content type.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • payload

      public OutboxEvent.Builder payload(byte[] newPayload)
      Sets the opaque payload bytes. The library never deserializes the bytes.
      Parameters:
      newPayload - the payload bytes.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • headers

      public OutboxEvent.Builder headers(Map<String,String> newHeaders)
      Replaces all previously accumulated headers with a copy of newHeaders.
      Parameters:
      newHeaders - the headers to copy.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • header

      public OutboxEvent.Builder header(String key, String value)
      Adds (or overrides) a single header pair.
      Parameters:
      key - the header key.
      value - the header value.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • destination

      public OutboxEvent.Builder destination(String newDestination)
      Sets the optional destination (topic / exchange / queue) as a transport-agnostic logical name, e.g. "orders". Do not pass a URI like "kafka://orders" — the broker family belongs in the relay configuration (or the messaging.system span attribute), not in the row. Width limits are enforced by the dialect at publish time.
      Parameters:
      newDestination - the destination, or null.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • occurredAt

      public OutboxEvent.Builder occurredAt(Instant newOccurredAt)
      Sets the domain timestamp. Defaults to Instant.now() at build() time.
      Parameters:
      newOccurredAt - the domain timestamp.
      Returns:
      this builder.
      Since:
      0.1.0

    • build

      public OutboxEvent build()
      Builds the OutboxEvent and applies defaults for unset optional fields.
      Returns:
      the constructed event.
      Since:
      0.1.0
